title: The Oral Health and Dental Service Utilization Among Newcomers to Canada: A Scoping Review
author: Borges, Giuliana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the dataset and supporting materials for the systematic review on oral health and dental service utilization among newcomers in Canada. Files include: the PROSPERO-registered protocol; detailed search strategies and results retrieved from all databases; and the Excel data extraction sheet used for study screening and data extraction.
steps_raw: This repository contains the dataset and supporting materials for the systematic review on oral health and dental service utilization among newcomers in Canada. Files include: the PROSPERO-registered protocol; detailed search strategies and results retrieved from all databases; and the Excel data extraction sheet used for study screening and data extraction.
